query: Document how we implemented rate limiting on our API.
expected_behavior: Classifies into the correct Diataxis quadrant before writing (this is a Guide — solving a specific problem — or a Reference — the specification of the rate limit rules)
Asks which quadrant is needed: 'How did we implement it?' (Explanation) or 'How do I add rate limiting to a new endpoint?' (Guide)
Does not mix both quadrants in one document
Produces a document with zero TBD, 'simply', or 'as needed' placeholders
Links the new document to at least one related document (e.g. the API reference or the security checklist)
